snapshot.title: Supply of Desktop Computers for Municipal Office

decision.recommendation: Apply only if GST, PAN, turnover proof, similar government supply experience, OEM authorization, warranty support, and EMD funds are ready before the deadline.

beforeApply.label: GST and PAN copies are available
Two similar government supply certificates are available
Three-year onsite warranty can be supported
Delivery can be completed within 30 days

source.title: Statutory Registration Documents
source.text: Valid GST registration certificate and PAN copy must be submitted with the technical bid.

source.title: Legal Constitution Proof
source.text: The bidder shall submit certificate of incorporation, partnership deed, or shop establishment registration as applicable.

source.title: Similar IT Hardware Experience
source.text: The bidder must have completed at least two similar IT hardware supply projects in government or public sector organizations.

source.title: Average Annual Turnover
source.text: The bidder must have average annual turnover not less than ₹50 lakh during the last three financial years.

source.title: Earnest Money Deposit
source.text: Earnest Money Deposit of ₹2,40,000 shall be submitted along with the bid.

source.title: OEM Authorization
source.text: OEM authorization letter for the quoted desktop model shall be enclosed with the technical bid.

source.title: Technical Compliance Format
source.text: The bidder shall submit a signed compliance sheet confirming each technical specification line item.

source.title: Warranty Undertaking
source.text: Three years onsite warranty undertaking shall be provided for all supplied desktop computers.

eligibility.title: Minimum turnover
eligibility.text: The bidder must have average annual turnover not less than ₹50 lakh during the last three financial years.

source.title: Average Annual Turnover
source.text: The bidder must have average annual turnover not less than ₹50 lakh during the last three financial years.

eligibility.title: Similar government supply experience
eligibility.text: At least two similar IT hardware supply projects must have been completed for government or public sector organizations.

source.title: Similar IT Hardware Experience
source.text: The bidder must have completed at least two similar IT hardware supply projects in government or public sector organizations.

eligibility.title: GST and PAN registration
eligibility.text: Valid GST registration certificate and PAN copy must be submitted with the technical bid.

source.title: Statutory Registration Documents
source.text: Valid GST registration certificate and PAN copy must be submitted with the technical bid.

eligibility.title: No blacklisting declaration
eligibility.text: The bidder should not have been blacklisted by any government department or public sector undertaking.

source.title: Blacklist Declaration
source.text: The bidder should not have been blacklisted by any government department or public sector undertaking.

source.title: Estimated Contract Value
source.text: The estimated value of the tender is ₹1.2 crore including supply, installation, testing and warranty obligations.

source.title: Earnest Money Deposit
source.text: Earnest Money Deposit of ₹2,40,000 shall be submitted along with the bid.

source.title: Security Deposit
source.text: The successful bidder shall submit security deposit equal to 5% of the accepted tender value within seven days of award.

source.title: Performance Guarantee
source.text: Performance guarantee of 3% of contract value shall be submitted before execution of agreement.

source.title: Delay Penalty
source.text: Delay beyond the stipulated delivery period shall attract penalty of ₹10,000 per day subject to maximum limit prescribed.

source.title: Quantity Requirement
source.text: The bidder shall supply 500 desktop computers as per the technical schedule.

technical.requirement: Minimum Intel i5 or Ryzen 5 equivalent processor

source.title: Processor Specification
source.text: Desktop computers shall have minimum Intel i5 or AMD Ryzen 5 equivalent processor.

source.title: Memory and Storage
source.text: Each desktop shall be supplied with 16GB RAM and 512GB SSD storage or higher.

source.title: OEM Authorization
source.text: OEM authorization letter for the quoted desktop model shall be enclosed with the technical bid.

source.title: Warranty Undertaking
source.text: Three years onsite warranty undertaking shall be provided for all supplied desktop computers.

technical.requirement: Delivery, installation and testing within 30 days

source.title: Delivery Period
source.text: Supply, installation and testing shall be completed within 30 days from the date of purchase order.

risks.title: Short delivery timeline
risks.explanation: Supply, installation and testing must be completed within 30 days.

source.title: Delivery Period
source.text: Supply, installation and testing shall be completed within 30 days from the date of purchase order.

risks.title: High EMD requirement
risks.explanation: ₹2,40,000 must be arranged before bid submission.

source.title: Earnest Money Deposit
source.text: Earnest Money Deposit of ₹2,40,000 shall be submitted along with the bid.

risks.title: OEM authorization dependency
risks.explanation: Bid may be rejected if OEM authorization is not submitted.

source.title: OEM Authorization
source.text: OEM authorization letter for the quoted desktop model shall be enclosed with the technical bid.

risks.title: Penalty for delay
risks.explanation: Delay can attract daily penalty until delivery is completed.

source.title: Delay Penalty
source.text: Delay beyond the stipulated delivery period shall attract penalty of ₹10,000 per day subject to maximum limit prescribed.

missingInformation: Financial bid opening date is not clearly mentioned
OEM authorization format is not provided
Exact payment release timeline after inspection is unclear
Escalation process for warranty service is not defined
departmentQuestions: Is MSME exemption allowed for EMD?
Will equivalent processor models be accepted?
Is OEM authorization mandatory for every quoted model?
What is the payment release timeline after installation?
Will partial delivery be accepted if all items are installed within 30 days?
proposalDraft:
Dear Sir/Madam,

We are pleased to submit our proposal for the supply of desktop computers for Pune Municipal Corporation against tender reference PMC/IT/2026/042. We confirm that we have reviewed the eligibility criteria, technical requirements, financial terms, delivery obligations, and compliance documents mentioned in the tender.

We undertake to submit all required certificates, declarations, financial documents, and technical compliance details as part of the bid. We also confirm our ability to execute the work within the prescribed timeline subject to final award and work order.

Regards,
Authorized Signatory
